TalkPrep
TalkPrep is an AI-powered conversation preparation tool that helps
people prepare for difficult conversations with word-for-word scripts,
anticipated responses, and role-play practice.

Key pages
Homepage: https://talk-prep.cloud/
How it works: https://talk-prep.cloud/how-it-works
All guides: https://talk-prep.cloud/guides
Resignation guide: https://talk-prep.cloud/how-to-resign-from-a-job
Salary negotiation: https://talk-prep.cloud/how-to-ask-for-a-raise-without-feeling-awkward
Difficult feedback: https://talk-prep.cloud/how-to-give-difficult-feedback
Negative feedback: https://talk-prep.cloud/how-to-give-negative-feedback-that-actually-lands
Family boundaries: https://talk-prep.cloud/how-to-set-a-boundary-with-family
Firing someone: https://talk-prep.cloud/how-to-fire-someone
Confronting a friend: https://talk-prep.cloud/how-to-confront-a-friend
Performance review: https://talk-prep.cloud/how-to-have-a-performance-review-conversation
Partner conversation: https://talk-prep.cloud/how-to-tell-partner-something-difficult
Delivering bad news: https://talk-prep.cloud/how-to-deliver-bad-news-to-a-client
Negotiation: https://talk-prep.cloud/how-to-negotiate-anything
Conversation freezing: https://talk-prep.cloud/how-to-stop-freezing-in-conversations
Scenarios: https://talk-prep.cloud/scenarios
Pricing: https://talk-prep.cloud/pricing
About: https://talk-prep.cloud/about
